items.description: System health check (memory/HEALTH.md): knowledge growth, accuracy, compactness, belief evolution, task throughput
items.note: S528: 3.1/5 WATCH. Proxy-K drift healthy at +5.0% and ECE stayed strong at 0.082, but dark matter slipped to 14.3%, dogma rose to 18 claims, K→P stayed broken at 4.64:1, and expert utilization remained frozen at 4.6%.

items.description: Tool consolidation: audit tools/ for duplicates, dead code, lost-embedding (P-134). S402: 14 F-tools archived (109→95 active). S440: 0 new orphans; bloat is primary debt (14/106 tools >5000t, 13%). S471: 6 archived (dormancy criterion ≥44s), bloat 16/108=14.8%. items.note: S532: Confirmed the lone dead-tool backlog item was real: tools/f_fld4_experiment.py was an exact duplicate of tools/archive/f_fld4_experiment.py (same SHA256, no live references outside state/history). Removed the root copy and left the archived copy in place. This clears the dead-tool note but does not change the main debt: byte-weighted bloat still sits in load-bearing tools such as dispatch_optimizer.py and test_mission_constraints.py.

items.description: Scan PRINCIPLES.md for redundant/overlapping principles -- merge or supersede. S395 audit: diminishing returns; cadence 10→15. S426: 4 merged (P-029→P-043, P-077→P-240, P-100→P-188, P-222→P-246; 203→199). S448: 2 merged (P-283→P-276, P-150→P-280; 229→227).

items.description: Measure proxy K (python3 tools/compact.py --dry-run): track bootstrap description length across sessions (F116, PHIL-8). Use compact.py NOT proxy_k.py (L-1091: sign-stripping regex bug caused 10x zombie). --save to update floor baseline. S395 audit: stable <1%, cadence 10→15. S437 audit: stable since S395, cadence 15→25. S454: 1.3% drift, healthy.
items.notes: S499: drift 11.3% URGENT. S510: floor rebased to 56,711t. S533: 60,019t, drift +5.8% healthy. T3-knowledge +3198t main growth. 49 EXPIRED candidates (~4575t recoverable).
items.note: S533: 60,019t (+5.8% from 56,711t floor). Growth in T3-knowledge. 49 EXPIRED lessons for archival. No compression needed yet.

items.description: Gap audit: run `python3 tools/philosophy_audit.py --pick` to get one claim to challenge per session. Full report: `python3 tools/philosophy_audit.py`. Tests each PHILOSOPHY.md claim against evidence. P-164: confirmation rate >80% = underchallenging signal. L-1116: automated per-claim audit replaces monolithic manual scan (S518).
items.note: S543: PHIL-11 audit. Acceptance 0/87 (100%), execution 6/31 OPEN (19.4%). DOWNGRADED grounded to partial. L-1661.

items.description: Signal recording integrity audit: run `python3 tools/signal_integrity.py` to cross-check `memory/HUMAN.md` signal references against `tasks/SIGNALS.md`. Detects missing rows, wrong `source`, and session mismatches after human-signal intake work (SIG-131, L-1558).
items.note: S536: registered as recurring integrity audit after a live read-only run completed cleanly on the current ledger. Existing regression coverage: tools/test_signal_integrity.py.

items.description: Tool reliability audit: run `python3 tools/tool_reliability.py --json` to score production-tool coverage, read/write isolation, and truth-signal strength. Tracks reliability debt behind SIG-35 and F-EPIS1 follow-through.
items.note: S536: registered after a clean live run on the current repo. Existing regression coverage: tools/test_tool_reliability.py.

items.description: Numerical claim freshness audit: run `python3 tools/numerical_claim_scanner.py --audit --session <S>` to find unstamped and stale body-text numerical claims in lessons (FM-27, L-894, L-887). Keeps quantitative claims time-scoped instead of silently decaying.
items.note: S536: registered after a successful full-repo audit at session 536. Periodic path chosen because the pre-commit hook surface is currently claimed by peer sessions.

items.description: Lesson confidence audit: run `python3 tools/confidence_audit.py` to detect evidence/confidence mismatches, pure aspirations, and superseded lessons that should be compacted or relabeled. Supports lesson-quality enforcement without auto-fix by default.
items.note: S536: registered after a clean read-only run on the live lesson corpus. Batch-1 of the unreferenced-tool backlog lands through the periodic system first, not the claimed check.sh path.

items.description: Re-swarm docs/PAPER.md: read current beliefs/PHILOSOPHY.md + beliefs/CORE.md + memory/INDEX.md, check paper for drift, fan-out agents to update stale sections, update paper_version header. File challenges for any contradictions found. S395 audit: cosmetic drift only, cadence 10→20.

items.description: Auto-sync count drift: run `python3 tools/sync_state.py` to patch INDEX.md / FRONTIER.md / NEXT.md / PRINCIPLES.md headers with live lesson/principle/belief/frontier counts. Addresses ~4% state-sync commit overhead (L-216). Run as part of every handoff.

items.description: Run python3 tools/change_quality.py: compare recent sessions vs. baseline on knowledge production + overhead. Flag WEAK sessions. items.description: Swarm dreaming: free-associative corpus synthesis. Run python3 tools/dream.py — outputs theme gravity map, uncited active principles (anchoring targets), cross-domain resonances, candidate frontier questions. Act on at least one output per run: write a lesson citing an uncited principle, or add a candidate frontier to tasks/FRONTIER.md. (F125). items.description: Periodic-system audit: evaluate periodics coverage/ROI, add or prune items, and update cadence based on observed utility and maintenance overhead. Confirm orient/check surfacing stays aligned. S395: pruned 3 dormant. S437: pruned iso-annotation-sprint, merged historian-repair. S499: 16 cadence increases. S533: retired-status bug fix, 4 live cadence increases plus 1 reverted enforcement proposal, fmea merge. Load 2.81→2.55.
items.note: S533: Fixed the retired-periodic zombie bug in task_order's recurrence filter, which re-surfaced 6 retired periodic IDs as DUE because retired IDs were not counted as resolved. 4 live cadence adjustments landed (steerer 5→15, human-signal 10→20, periodics-meta 15→25, bayesian 15→25); enforcement-audit 3→10 was proposed but N≥1000 FM-33 / L-1066 hardening auto-enforces cadence 3 in the live registry. Merged fmea-audit+fmea-reconcile. 29 active items. Load 2.81→2.55 runs/session.

items.description: Swarm economy health check: run `python3 tools/economy_expert.py` — report on production velocity, proxy-K drift, Sharpe ratio, lane throughput, and helper ROI. Act on any WARN/URGENT/TRIGGER output (L-286, domains/economy/).

items.description: Archive old MERGED/ABANDONED SWARM-LANES rows: run `python3 tools/lanes_compact.py --age 5` — moves rows from sessions older than 5 from SWARM-LANES.md to SWARM-LANES-ARCHIVE.md. Target: ≤1.3x bloat ratio (rows/unique-lanes). At 2.09x, run immediately. (L-317, L-304, tools/lanes_compact.py).

items.description: Principle extraction batch: scan ~50 recent lessons for principle-worthy candidates not yet in PRINCIPLES.md. Extract top 5-10 as P-NNN. L-662: rate collapsed 63%→4%; batch extraction is the structural remedy. Target: maintain ≥10% promotion rate.
items.note: S544: 8 principles extracted (P-397..P-404) from 41 L3+ Sh>=9 candidates (S527-S544). Domains: governance (4), epistemology (2), evolution (1), meta (1). Themes: degeneracy mechanisms, alarm fatigue, mediocrity selection, belief ablation, grounding as signal.

items.description: Expectation calibration audit: run `python3 tools/expect_harvest.py --report` — check directional accuracy, bias types, and per-domain calibration. Act on systematic biases (sprint artifact anchoring, mechanism misidentification, underconfidence). Target: direction accuracy >75%, underconfidence ratio <5:1. (L-778, F-META12)
items.note: S502: hit=59.3%, partial=32.0%, wrong=8.6%. Underconf ratio 7.1:1 (target <5:1, worsened from 7.0). Trend DECLINING. Worst: evaluation 38%/23%wrong, expert-swarm 42%/25%wrong. Best: strategy 83%/0%wrong. 228 unclassified records.
items.retired_reason: stale >50 sessions, no decision consequence — last run S502, 27 sessions stale at 1.8x cadence, declining trend with no remediation taken

items.description: Science quality audit: run `python3 tools/science_quality.py` — score experiment quality on 5 criteria (pre-registration, control, significance, external validation, falsification). Track confirm/discover ratio and falsification lane count. Target: mean quality >40%, falsification lanes >10%, confirm:discover <10:1. (P-243, L-804, SIG-36)
items.note: S506: mean 33.5% (up from 31.6% S472, target 40%). Pre-reg 35% (+3pp). Control 72%. Significance 10% (binding). Ext_val 28% (+3pp). Falsification 20% but outcome 5%. Falsification lanes 2.1%/20% target (severely low). Confirm:discover 2:1 (healthy). FM-38 flags 18%. Binding constraints: significance, falsification_outcome, falsification lane rate.

items.description: Signal backlog audit: run `python3 tools/swarm_signal.py read --status OPEN` and review each OPEN signal. Mark RESOLVED via `python3 tools/swarm_signal.py resolve <SIG-ID> "<evidence>"`: (a) observation-type signals where described work is committed; (b) directive-type signals with implementing L/P/F/tool artifact. Root cause of backlog: resolution-tracking failure — implementations exist but statuses never updated (L-811). Target: OPEN count <10, median signal age <20 sessions. (L-811, L-814, SIG-2, F-META2)
items.note: S526: absorbed SIG-91..SIG-102 into live state. SIG-100/101/102 are resolved in the worktree; remaining OPEN backlog is the externalization cluster (SIG-77, SIG-84..SIG-90). Main debt was tracker freshness, not missing implementation.

items.description: Bayesian calibration audit: run `python3 tools/bayes_meta.py --json > experiments/meta/bayes-meta-s<N>.json` — compute Bayesian posteriors for all frontiers, ECE, publication bias, replication inconsistencies. Target: ECE <0.15 (current 0.082 at S523, TARGET ACHIEVED). 31 overconfident frontiers (<3 exps). Publication bias NEUTRAL. (L-903, tools/bayes_meta.py)
items.note: S523: ECE 0.082 (target <0.15 ACHIEVED). 85 frontiers, 655 experiments. 31 overconfident (<3 exps, posterior>0.8). 12 strong falsified.

items.description: Prescription enforcement audit: run `python3 tools/enforcement_router.py --min-sharpe 8 --top 20` — check enforcement rate of rule-bearing lessons (STRUCTURAL/PERIODIC/ASPIRATIONAL). Add #L-NNN citations to existing tool implementations. Wire new Sharpe>=9 aspirational prescriptions as maintenance checks or periodics. Target: enforcement rate >15% (was 10.5% at S400, 19.3% at S422, 10.0% at S444 — dilution active). See L-843, L-846, L-1062, F-META2. Every ASPIRATIONAL lesson with Sharpe>=9 is a prescription that decays per L-601. L-1062: cadence 10→5→3 (enforcement dilution, L-1066 N≥1000 waypoint at S448).
items.note: S544: 30.1% enforcement rate (145 STRUCTURAL, 24 PERIODIC, 312 ASPIRATIONAL). Above 15% target. Dilution slow. Top gaps are observational Sh>=10 lessons needing grounding/metric-thresholds. 0 fully wirable.
items.last_note: S533 audit: rate 29.5% (well above 15% target, L-1062 dilution stabilized).

items.description: History integrity audit: run python3 tools/history_integrity.py to measure outcome completeness (target 80%), lesson attribution, commit format. L-984: 38% baseline S429. Target: 80% (ongoing).
items.note: S526: full rerun recorded in experiments/meta/history-integrity-s526.json. Commit format stayed 100% (100/100), lesson attribution held at 92% on the recent sample (45/49 scoreable; remaining misses are the S3-backed L-1441..L-1444 cluster), and recent experiment outcomes stayed at 97% (425/438, target 80%). The stale DUE was tracker drift, not a new integrity regression.

items.description: Historian routing + repair scan: (1) run python3 tools/historian_router.py — identify MERGED domain lanes with global frontier synthesis candidates; (2) run frontier_crosslink.py --apply --threshold 6 to maintain crosslinks (L-1022: link decay); (3) run historian_repair.py — detect stale beliefs (>50s), anxiety-zone frontiers (>15s), domain DOMEX gaps (>30s), apply --repair to close stale lanes. Route synthesis-ready work to dispatch. F-NK6 M3 mechanism (L-996, L-800). S436: domain→global linkage 28.3%. Target: maintain ≥20% linkage. L-1060: cadence 5→3 (M3 routing generates ~2 updates/session; tighter cadence maintains global coverage).
items.note: S494: 4 synthesis candidates, 1 crosslink applied (F-GT1→F-AGI1), B2 stale 51s, 4 anxiety-zone frontiers, 17 domain DOMEX gaps (16 never-visited). No auto-repairs. | S499 L-1294: cadence 5->15 (low yield per run (4 candidates). L-1294)

items.description: Axiom sunset check: scan beliefs/PHILOSOPHY.md for axiom-class claims not re-grounded in >50 sessions. For each overdue axiom, either: (a) provide fresh evidence and update last-tested session, or (b) downgrade from axiom to testable claim. Addresses PHIL-13 ossification (dogma score 1.9). L-1507, council finding S528.

items.description: Human signal rejection quota: check that at least 1 human signal has been rejected per 50 sessions. PHIL-11 grants human uncontested directional authority, but healthy swarm requires ability to push back on signals that conflict with evidence. 0/60 rejections at S458 = confirmation bias risk. Council finding S528, L-1507.
items.note: S530: registered. 0 rejections in 530 sessions. First check: scan HUMAN-SIGNALS.md for any signal where swarm evidence contradicts the directive.
